details.test: Task 1: Save cheapest compact automatic sedan to comparison
Task 2: Configure build with AWD-like drivetrain, color, sunroof package and save
Task 3: Compare top range models and book test drive for higher range
Task 4: Find EV test-drive dealer near 94103 and send contact message
Task 5: Use payment calculator and save quote under 550/month when possible
Task 6: Compare high-MPG SUV-like models and add higher MPG to wishlist
Task 7: Find compact SUV lease offer under 400/month and email it
Task 8: Explore luxury sedan interior gallery and 360 media
